post.description: Verifies the Stripe-Signature header and processes the event.

post.summary: Get Stripe checkout URL to upgrade to Plus
Verify email address with the code sent on registration
Set initial password for OAuth-created accounts
post.description: Only available when needsPasswordSetup is true (OAuth accounts without a password).

post.summary: Complete password reset using token from email

parameters.name: tokenMode
parameters.description: COOKIE sets httpOnly cookie, DIRECT returns token in body

post.description: Generates a TOTP secret, stores it, and returns the QR URI and plain secret. Requires a verified account with MFA not yet enabled.
Validates the TOTP code against the stored secret and enables MFA on the account.

400.description: Invalid TOTP code or setup not initiated

post.description: Exchanges a short-lived MFA challenge token and a TOTP code for a refresh token.

parameters.name: tokenMode
parameters.description: COOKIE sets httpOnly cookie, DIRECT returns token in body

401.description: Invalid or expired challenge token, or wrong TOTP code

post.summary: Logout — clears the refresh token cookie

parameters.name: tokenMode
parameters.description: COOKIE sets httpOnly cookie, DIRECT returns token in body

post.summary: Initiate password reset — sends reset link to email

204.description: Reset email sent (always, to avoid enumeration)

delete.summary: Delete the authenticated user and all their subdomains

patch.summary: Update username or password of the authenticated user

get.summary: Get user detail including their subdomains

Override the maximum subdomain count for a user

Get OAuth authorization URL for account linking

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: Subdomain label to check (without parent domain)

get.summary: Get Stripe billing portal URL for the authenticated user
Exchange refresh token cookie for a short-lived identity token

400.description: Missing or invalid refresh token cookie

get.description: Exchanges the authorization code for a token, resolves or creates the local user, and sets the refresh token cookie. Redirects to the frontend on success or failure.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Authorization code returned by the provider

302.description: Redirect to frontend (dashboard on success, /login?oauthError=true on failure, including upstream OAuth errors)

400.description: Invalid or expired state / unknown provider (ResponseStatusException propagated)

502.description: Token exchange or user-info fetch failed (ResponseStatusException propagated)

get.description: Redirects the user to the provider's authorization page. Supported providers: google, github, discord.

delete.summary: Unlink an OAuth identity from the authenticated user

404.description: No such identity linked to this account

409.description: Cannot unlink the only authentication method
